story_premise: A micro horror story about one classroom clock anomaly and one final callback.

story_graph.protagonist_want: get through attendance without being noticed
story_graph.protagonist_fear: being erased from the class list
story_graph.reader_care_reason: the child is the only one trying to keep their name
story_graph.relationship_signal: the child keeps looking to the teacher for help

nodes.typed_hook: The class clock starts ticking backward during attendance.
nodes.typed_narration: The child grips the desk because only their name is skipped when the second hand jumps back.
nodes.next_page_question: Why does the clock move only when the teacher reaches that name?
nodes.final_hook_sentence: The clock hand points at the empty line in the register.
nodes.reader_retention_goal: Hold curiosity around the skipped name.
nodes.visual_memory_point: a classroom clock pointing at a blank register line
nodes.emotional_turn: fear becomes a decision to speak up
nodes.protagonist_want: keep the name on the register
nodes.reader_care_reason: the child is alone with a specific danger

nodes.typed_hook: The skipped name starts fading from every workbook.
nodes.typed_narration: The child writes the name again, but the pencil mark turns to dust before the teacher looks down.
nodes.next_page_question: What happens if nobody can read the name by the final bell?
nodes.final_hook_sentence: The dust gathers beneath the same backward clock.
nodes.reader_retention_goal: Escalate the danger from clock to identity.
nodes.visual_memory_point: a workbook name turning into gray dust
nodes.threat_delta: The anomaly moves from the clock to written names.
nodes.protagonist_want: rewrite the name before it disappears
nodes.reader_care_reason: the child makes an active attempt
nodes.character_choice: the child writes the name again
nodes.concrete_behavior: the child presses the pencil hard

repeated_clues.escalation: the name now disappears from workbooks

nodes.typed_hook: The final bell rings from inside the register.
nodes.typed_narration: The child opens the register and sees the classroom clock drawn beside the only blank line.
nodes.final_hook_sentence: The blank line writes the child's name backward.
nodes.reader_retention_goal: Close the loop with one final unease.
nodes.visual_memory_point: a register line writing a name backward
nodes.opening_callback: The backward classroom clock returns inside the register.
nodes.twist_reveal: The clock was erasing the name from the beginning.
nodes.reader_care_reason: the child's effort causes the callback
nodes.concrete_behavior: the child's hand freezes on the page
